meta.title: AWS DevOps Certification for Real-World Automation Skills
meta.description: Develop practical DevOps capabilities through AWS DevOps Certification focused on automation, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and cloud operations.

@graph.name: AWS DevOps Certification Course
@graph.description: The AWS DevOps Certification Course by Teksversity provides practical training in AWS services, DevOps tools, and automation practices through hands-on learning and real-time projects.

mainEntity.name: What is the AWS DevOps Certification Course about?

acceptedAnswer.text: The AWS DevOps Certification Course at Teksversity teaches cloud computing on AWS along with DevOps tools, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and deployment practices through hands-on projects.

mainEntity.name: What tools and technologies are covered in the AWS DevOps course?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course covers AWS core services, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Git, automation tools, infrastructure as code, and deployment monitoring practices.

mainEntity.name: Is this AWS DevOps course suitable for beginners?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the program starts with cloud and Linux fundamentals before progressing into advanced AWS architecture, automation, and DevOps workflows.

mainEntity.name: What career roles can I pursue after AWS DevOps certification?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates can pursue roles such as AWS Cloud Engineer, DevOps Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer, Cloud Administrator, and Infrastructure Automation Engineer.

mainEntity.name: Does the AWS DevOps course include hands-on projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, learners build real-world CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, containerized applications, and automation workflows using AWS and DevOps tools.

mainEntity.name: What makes Teksversity’s AWS DevOps training unique?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity focuses on job-ready DevOps skills with practical labs, real-time cloud projects, industry-aligned curriculum, and mentorship from experienced cloud professionals.

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Become a Certified AWS DevOps Expert
overViewOfOnline.description: The AWS DevOps Certification Course is an advanced industry-driven program that equips learners with the power to automate, deploy, and manage modern cloud infrastructures. Designed for future-ready professionals, it blends AWS cloud mastery with DevOps practices helping you create faster, smarter, and more reliable software delivery pipelines. From CI/CD and infrastructure as code to container arrangement and monitoring, this course shapes you into a certified cloud automation expert ready to transform enterprise operations.
keyPoints: Learn AWS security & cost optimization
Work on live cloud automation projects
Master agile deployment & team collaboration
Get placement support & certification guidance

heading: Why Choose AWS DevOps Certification Course in
Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)

content.value: Teksversity’s AWS DevOps Certification Course stands out for its future-focused approach that merges DevOps automation with real-world AWS ecosystem mastery. Learners dive deep into CI/CD pipelines, IaC, and serverless deployment using

labs that simulate enterprise operations. Each module is built with adaptive learning intelligence, helping students experience how real cloud systems evolve under continuous delivery. With expert-led mentoring and advanced simulation projects, Teksversity ensures that every learner transforms theoretical understanding into deployable, scalable cloud solutions.

description.firstDescription: What makes Teksversity’s AWS DevOps program unique is its strong integration of modern DevOps tools with cloud-native technologies. Learners build complete deployment pipelines, automated configurations and monitor production systems in live virtual environments. The curriculum is engineered with real AWS architecture blueprints, ensuring direct exposure to real-time orchestration, cost optimization, and performance engineering. The program’s structure blends collaborative learning, team-based sprints, and expert evaluations mirroring the dynamics of actual DevOps teams to cultivate both leadership and operational excellence in every learner.

description.secondDescription: Teksversity’s learning path is designed to connect multiple AWS skill journeys making it ideal for those also pursuing the aws cloud practitioner course, aws developer certification, or aws machine learning certification. Students gain advanced insight into DevSecOps, multi-cloud integration, and AI-driven automation, preparing them for elite-level tech careers. With live mentoring, placement guidance, and cloud lab support, learners master not just AWS tools but the mindset of continuous improvement. Teksversity turns ambitious professionals into intelligent DevOps engineers who can innovate, optimize, and lead the cloud revolution.

keyPoints: Master automation, CI/CD, and AWS cloud architecture.
Learn Infrastructure as Code, Kubernetes, and microservices.
Train with enterprise-grade DevOps workflows and best practices.
Gain real-world readiness with an industry-aligned syllabus.
Build and deploy live AWS projects.
Automate workflows using Docker, Jenkins, and CloudFormation.
Implement monitoring with CloudWatch and Grafana.
Work in scalable, production-like environments.
Learn from AWS-certified DevOps experts.
Join live sessions, code labs, and design reviews.
Get real-time feedback and career insights.
Engage with mentors from global cloud teams.
AI-based career guidance and mock interviews.
Job assistance with top cloud-driven companies.
Globally recognized AWS DevOps certification.
Launch your career in automation and cloud engineering.

sections.title: Global Cloud Market Revenue
sections.data: The global cloud computing market is expected to surpass $1 trillion by 2026, with AWS being a major player driving this growth through its extensive service offerings (Source: Gartner).

sections.title: Employment Growth
sections.data: The AWS and DevOps job market is estimated to grow at 24% from 2022 to 2032, as organizations increasingly adopt cloud solutions and agile practices (Source: LinkedIn).

sections.title: Average Salary in India
sections.data: The average salary for AWS and DevOps professionals in India ranges from ₹10,00,000 to ₹20,00,000 per annum (Source: Indeed, Glassdoor).

sections.title: Size of the Industry
sections.data: The Indian cloud computing market is projected to grow to $15 billion by 2026, reflecting the rapid adoption of cloud technologies (Source: NASSCOM).

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

hiringPartners.hiringPartnersSubheading: Get ready to grab your dream job! Join the talent pool with access to the world's best hiring companies.

faq.question: What is the AWS DevOps Certification Course at Teksversity about?
faq.answer: Our AWS DevOps Certification Course helps you build in-demand cloud skills by mastering AWS services, automation tools, and continuous delivery techniques. Through hands-on projects and expert guidance, we prepare you to design, implement, and manage real-world DevOps solutions, so you’re career-ready from day one.

faq.question: Who can enroll in the AWS DevOps Training?
faq.answer: Whether you’re an experienced IT professional or just starting your tech career, Teksversity’s AWS DevOps Training equips you with the skills to excel in cloud operations and automation. No prior cloud experience is required our experts ensure every learner is supported through a step-by-step approach.

faq.question: How long is the AWS DevOps Course at Teksversity?
faq.answer: Our AWS DevOps Course spans 8–12 weeks, designed to fit the schedule of working professionals and full-time learners alike. With flexible batch options and personalized learning support, Teksversity ensures steady progress from fundamentals to advanced AWS DevOps expertise.

faq.question: What tools and technologies are covered in the AWS DevOps Training?
faq.answer: At Teksversity, we train you on core AWS and DevOps tools used by top companies Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Ansible, and Git alongside AWS services like EC2, CloudFormation, S3, and CodeDeploy. This combination helps you gain job-ready skills for modern DevOps roles.

faq.question: What kind of projects will I work on during the program?
faq.answer: Our AWS DevOps Certification Course includes real-world projects designed to strengthen your technical and problem-solving skills. You’ll work on CI/CD automation, infrastructure provisioning, and container orchestration on AWS, preparing you for job-ready DevOps roles.

faq.question: Does Teksversity provide support for AWS certification exams?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Our AWS DevOps Training includes dedicated certification coaching with structured study plans, practice exams, and personalized feedback. We help you build both the technical and exam confidence needed to become an AWS Certified DevOps professional.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after completing the AWS DevOps Course?
faq.answer: Completing our AWS DevOps Training opens doors to top-paying roles in cloud computing and automation, including DevOps Engineer, Cloud Architect, and AWS Engineer. With industry-recognized certification and hands-on experience, you’ll be equipped to thrive in one of the fastest-growing tech careers.

faq.question: What is the average salary after earning the AWS DevOps Certification?
faq.answer: AWS DevOps Certified professionals from Teksversity often earn starting packages of ₹7–₹18 LPA, depending on expertise and role. With growing demand for AWS-powered DevOps skills, many of our learners go on to achieve significant career growth and global opportunities.

faq.question: Does Teksversity offer placement assistance after course completion?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We go beyond training by offering end-to-end career support, resume enhancement, mock interviews, and direct connections to leading employers so you can land high-demand roles in AWS DevOps quickly after certification.

faq.question: What kind of support does Teksversity provide during the AWS DevOps course?
faq.answer: Our support system includes direct access to expert trainers, scheduled doubt resolution sessions, detailed study materials, and an interactive learner community. This ensures you get the help you need quickly while staying motivated and progressing confidently in your AWS DevOps training.
